notableEvents.label: Gunnar Henderson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Gunnar Henderson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Coby Mayo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Coby Mayo grounds out, third baseman Manny Machado to first baseman Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Coby Mayo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Coby Mayo doubles (7) on a ground ball to left fielder Samad Taylor.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts plunked

notableEvents.label: Nick Solak pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Solak out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Xander Bogaerts scores.
